title: S + V + N + p.p.（受詞 + 過去分詞作受詞補語）

formulas.zh: 讓……被……；使……被……。受詞與過去分詞為被動關係

explanation: 此句型表示主詞使役受詞處於被動狀態。受詞 O 與過去分詞 p.p. 之間呈被動關係，即受詞是動作的承受者。常見動詞包括 have（讓、使）、get（使）、want（想要）、find（發現）、need（需要）、keep（保持）等。此結構常用於表達「希望某事被完成」或「讓某人做某事」的含義，是英文中表達使役概念的重要句型。

examples.eng: She wants her car fixed before the weekend.
examples.chi: 她想在週末前把她的車修好。

examples.eng: I need to have this document translated into Chinese.
examples.chi: 我需要把這份文件翻譯成中文。

examples.eng: He got his house painted last summer.
examples.chi: 去年夏天他請人把房子漆了。

examples.eng: We found the data collected and analyzed by the research team.
examples.chi: 我們發現研究團隊已收集並分析了數據。

extension.tip: 判斷方法：若受詞與過去分詞間可加「被」，則為此句型。切勿與「S + V + O + to V」混淆。「have/get/want + O + p.p.」表被動關係，而「have/get + O + V」則表主動。注意 have 和 get 在此用法中意義相近，但 get 較口語化。

examples.test: I want him finished the work. ✗ vs I want the work finished. ✓
examples.result: → 受詞應與 p.p. 成被動關係。work 是被完成的，所以用 finished；him 不能被 finished，應改為 finish

examples.test: She had her hair cut by a professional. ✓ vs She had her hair cutting. ✗
examples.result: → p.p.（cut）表示頭髮被剪，而非進行中。cutting 表主動進行，不符合此句型

examples.test: They got the project completed on time. ✓
examples.result: → project 與 completed 為被動關係，表示他們使該專案按時完成

extension.note: 受詞 + p.p. = 受詞被……；若能加「被」字理解，就是此句型。

exercises.sentence: I need to have this essay proofread before Friday.
exercises.translation: 我需要在週五前請人校對這篇論文。

exercises.sentence: She wants her wedding dress made by a famous designer.
exercises.translation: 她想要一位名設計師為她製作婚紗。

parts: to next Monday because of the holiday.
exercises.sentence: We had the meeting postponed to next Monday because of the holiday.
exercises.translation: 由於假日的原因，我們把會議推遲到下週一。

exercises.sentence: They found the building completed and ready for occupation.
exercises.translation: 他們發現該建築已完工，可以入住了。
